touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Ethan Adams introducing our automation platform for PropTech sales teams. No response received.

Connected with Ethan Adams on cold call. Brief intro to our platform's automation capabilities for sales teams. Ethan expressed initial interest in learning more about rep productivity improvements. Scheduled follow-up.

questions_asked.question: What exactly does your platform automate for sales reps?
questions_asked.answer: We automate data entry, follow-up sequencing, and proposal generation so reps can focus on selling rather than admin work.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with product overview and case study from similar PropTech company. Ethan responded asking about pricing tiers and implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Most teams are up and running within 2 weeks, including training and customization.

next_steps: Schedule deeper discovery call to understand their workflows

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Ethan covering current sales workflows at VelocityForm. Team of 9 reps spending 40% of time on manual data entry and follow-up tasks. Ethan sees clear value in automation but needs to understand ROI. Discussed use cases specific to PropTech sales cycles.

questions_asked.question: What's your team's biggest bottleneck right now in the sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Manual CRM updates and follow-up tracking. Reps are drowning in admin work.

questions_asked.question: How many seats would you need to start with?
questions_asked.answer: We have 9 sales reps total, so probably all of them if this works.

questions_asked.question: Can you integrate with our existing CRM and tech stack?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we integrate with all major CRMs. We'd do a technical audit during implementation.

next_steps: Prepare custom demo focused on PropTech workflows

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email after discovery with custom ROI analysis showing potential 15-hour weekly savings per rep. Attached demo invitation and agenda. Ethan confirmed demo time and asked if we could focus on the proposal automation feature.

questions_asked.question: Can we focus the demo on proposal automation specifically?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, that's one of our strongest features. I'll tailor the demo to show exactly how it works for your deal types.

touches.ai_summary: Extended demo and evaluation discussion with Ethan. Walked through full platform including automation workflows, reporting, and proposal generation. Ethan was engaged and asked detailed questions about customization. However, noted he hasn't yet brought in his CEO or other stakeholders. Discussed pricing ranges and next steps toward proposal.

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the automation workflows for our specific PropTech sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable. You can build custom triggers, actions, and rules specific to your deal stages and property types.

questions_asked.question: Should we get your leadership team involved to align on this investment?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority for this size deal, so I can move forward. I'll keep them in the loop.

questions_asked.question: What does pricing look like for 9 seats with unlimited automation?
questions_asked.answer: For 9 seats with unlimited automation, we're typically in the $12-15K range annually, but let me work up a formal proposal.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to have something in place by end of quarter if the pricing works.

objections: Need to stay within budget constraints for the quarter
next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing options

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Ethan. Walked through the proposal showing $12K ACV for 9 seats. Ethan expressed concern about budget and asked if we could come down to make it work this quarter. Emphasized value but acknowledged pricing flexibility needed.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the pricing to get us closer to $6-7K for year one?
questions_asked.answer: That's a significant discount from our standard pricing. Let me talk to my manager about what's possible to get you started.

objections: Pricing is above allocated budget for this quarter
next_steps: Schedule pricing call to finalize terms

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call with Ethan. Discussed revised pricing at $6K ACV (38.6% discount) to meet budget constraints and close this quarter. Ethan agreed to terms pending final contract review. Still single-threaded through Ethan without exec visibility, but he committed to moving forward.

questions_asked.question: At $6K for 9 seats, can you commit to moving forward with contracts this week?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, if you can get me the contract by tomorrow, I can turn it around quickly.

questions_asked.question: Is this pricing locked in if we want to expand seats next year?
questions_asked.answer: This is a special first-year rate. Renewals would be at standard pricing, but we can discuss growth discounts when the time comes.

next_steps: Target signature by end of week
